company_name: H2O So Clean Pool & Spa Services

hero.headline: San Diego's Most Trusted Pool Care Pro
hero.subheadline: Get a free consultation worth $220 — including a 13-factor water chemistry analysis and 45-point equipment inspection. Daniel and the H2O So Clean team deliver honest, reliable pool care with no surprises and no hidden fees.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool, Spa & Fountain<br class="hidden md:block"> Care Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency repairs, Daniel and the H2O So Clean team handle every aspect of your pool, spa, and fountain — so you can relax and enjoy the water.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly maintenance including water chemistry testing, skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and chemical balancing — your pool stays crystal clear year-round.

cards.title: Pool Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and plumbing. Most issues resolved same-visit so your pool is back up and running fast.

cards.title: Spa Service & Repairs
cards.description: Complete spa and hot tub maintenance, servicing, and repair. We keep your spa clean, safe, and performing at its best every soak.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of new pools, spas, and related equipment — quality craftsmanship backed by our California Contractor's License.

cards.title: Fountain Service & Repairs
cards.description: Maintenance, cleaning, and repair for residential and commercial fountains. We keep your water features running beautifully and efficiently.

cards.title: Equipment Inspection
cards.description: Our thorough 45-point equipment inspection and system efficiency evaluation catches small issues before they become expensive problems.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Sparkling Pool

steps.title: Book Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Schedule your complimentary $220-value consultation. Daniel will perform a 13-factor water chemistry analysis and 45-point equipment inspection — no obligation, no pressure.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Care Plan
steps.description: Based on your pool's specific needs, we build a personalized service plan with transparent pricing. You'll know exactly what you're paying for — no hidden fees.

steps.title: Dive In & Relax
steps.description: We handle everything from chemicals to equipment checks on a reliable schedule. Your pool stays swim-ready, and if anything's ever off, we make it right — guaranteed.

about.label: Why San Diego Trusts H2O So Clean
about.headline: Owner-Operated Service — Daniel Handles Your Pool Personally
about.description: Founded in 2018, H2O So Clean is built on one simple idea: pool care should be honest, professional, and done right the first time. Owner Daniel is a Certified Pool Operator (CPO #623805) and holds a California Contractor's License (#1067459). Every client gets the same hands-on attention — because your pool deserves an expert, not a rotating crew of strangers.

features.title: Licensed & Certified Operator
features.description: Daniel holds both a CPO certification and a California Contractor's License — the credentials that separate professionals from hobbyists.

features.title: Transparent, Fair Pricing
features.description: No hidden fees, no surprise charges, no upselling. You get honest pricing upfront so you always know exactly what you're paying for.

features.title: Same-Day & Next-Day Response
features.description: While other companies schedule weeks out, H2O So Clean is known for fast response times. Urgent issue? We'll be there when you need us.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes our 13-factor water chemistry analysis. No contracts, no hidden fees — just honest pool care you can count on.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, Daniel will personally return and make it right at no additional charge. With a perfect 5.0-star Google rating across 33 reviews, our track record speaks for itself — but our guarantee ensures you never have to worry.

faqs.question: What's included in the free $220 consultation?
faqs.answer: Your complimentary consultation includes a comprehensive 13-factor water chemistry analysis, a 45-point equipment inspection, and a system efficiency evaluation. Daniel personally reviews everything and provides recommendations with transparent pricing — no obligation whatsoever.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: We're known for being faster than the competition. Many clients are scheduled within 1-2 days, and we offer same-day or next-day availability for urgent repairs. Just call Daniel directly and we'll work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do you service spas and fountains too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide full-service maintenance, repair, and installation for pools, spas, hot tubs, and fountains — both residential and commercial. One call covers all your water features.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Daniel is a Certified Pool Operator (CPO #623805) and holds a California Contractor's License (#1067459). We carry full liability insurance for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: What areas in San Diego do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of San Diego County including La Jolla, Del Mar, Carmel Valley, Rancho Santa Fe, Encinitas, Carlsbad, Oceanside, Poway, Scripps Ranch, and surrounding communities. Call us to confirm coverage in your area.

testimonials.name: Julie Miller
testimonials.text: Dan recently helped me with a pool heater connectivity issue and was so patient walking me through all the steps. He is super knowledgeable and professional.

testimonials.name: Samuel M.
testimonials.text: Pool heater stopped working and filter was leaking. Called H2O which was the best thing I did. Daniel was so nice, friendly, and knowledgeable. Got a few other quotes but Daniel had the best prices and fastest service.

testimonials.name: Anthony DaSilva
testimonials.text: Daniel was not only quick to respond but he spent the time to go over the situation in detail. He walked me through getting it resolved knowing that he was not getting paid for his time and help.

contact.headline:
Ready for Pool Care
You Can Actually Trust?
contact.subtitle: Claim your free $220 consultation today. Daniel will personally assess your pool with a 13-factor water analysis and 45-point equipment inspection — no obligation, no pressure.
